steps.title: Read the data point from the scatterplot at wind speed 8 m/s
steps.content: Locate $x = 8$ m/s on the horizontal axis of the scatterplot. The corresponding data point sits closest to $y = 640$ watts on the vertical axis. Among the choices ($640$, $800$, $840$, $900$), $640$ is the closest match. That matches choice A — A is correct.
